forbidden_repair: No parent/test, candidate closure, hash, source, exact-min, loss-weight, or V4-F/test32 gate is weakened.
interpretation: RESULT.split is the trainer executable split projection; the content-addressed frozen split retains three provenance-only keys. All train_parents, score_parents, their hashes, fold identity, split_id, open-only and test32 gates are identical in all 20 results.
v1_1_repair: Require the exact projection key set (frozen keys minus exactly the three provenance-only keys), bit/exact JSON equality for every projected value, and independently validate the frozen split schema/training hash/source manifest hash. Existing prediction candidate/parent/outer-fold closure gates are unchanged.
